LibraryBuild.name: Sophie's Atelier
LibraryBuild.note: "It goes without saying, but this is my atelier! It's always full of customers and doing really well... Or at least that's what I'm aiming for, but it's not going too well..."

LibraryBuild.name: Town Entrance
LibraryBuild.note: "This is the entrance to the town of Kirchen Bell. It's not a huge town, but there are a lot of people here because we get lots of tourists, adventurers, and traveling merchants visiting."

LibraryBuild.name: Plaza
LibraryBuild.note: "This is the big plaza in front of the church. The main landmark is the fancy fountain. There are pretty flowers, so it's nice to just sit down on a bench and relax."

LibraryBuild.name: Church
LibraryBuild.note: "The church is this town's number one tourist attraction. Pamela works as a nun here. Its real name is the "Varum Church", and you can hear its bells from anywhere in town."

LibraryBuild.name: Street
LibraryBuild.note: "This is the town's main street, with all kinds of shops lined up. It's the most lively place in town, and you can buy pretty much anything you want here... It's really tempting, I need to make sure that I don't buy things I don't need."

LibraryBuild.name: Café
LibraryBuild.note: "This is the café run by Mr. Horst. The tea and sweets here are delicious! It seems like a lot of customers come here just to talk to Mr. Horst too."

LibraryBuild.name: Grocery Store
LibraryBuild.note: "It's Mrs. Marguerite's grocery store! She always has really tasty looking vegetables. It makes me hungry just looking at them. The freshly picked vegetables in the morning are especially good!"

LibraryBuild.name: Blacksmith
LibraryBuild.note: "This is the blacksmith shop run by Logy. There's a furnace for heating up and melting down metals, so it's always really hot in here. I feel like I'll end up melting too."

LibraryBuild.name: Clock Shop
LibraryBuild.note: "This is Harol's clock shop. There are a lot of clocks in here... With this many clocks, I doubt you'd ever be late to a meeting or anything."

LibraryBuild.name: Edge of Town
LibraryBuild.note: "This is the edge of the town of Kirchen Bell. There's not really anything in particular here, but it's on a hill, so you can see the whole town. I really like the view from here."

LibraryBuild.name: Old Town
LibraryBuild.note: "Old Town. When this town was first built, most people lived here. Apparently, the big tree growing here was planted when the town was founded."

LibraryBuild.name: Book Store
LibraryBuild.note: "This is Elise's book store. She has everything, from children's picture books, to huge books that scholars would want to read. She even has some books about alchemy."

LibraryBuild.name: Nearby Forest
LibraryBuild.note: "This is the shallow forest behind the town. Its size is perfect, so kids like to come play here... The grave here is where someone really important to me rests."
